name: - Ms. Chalice -
description:
"Allright. Why were you following me?"

Meet miss chalice herself! After following her for a bit. She finally confronts you in an alley

So... why did i make this? To clarify something. This is probably the one and only bot I'll ever make on this website. Why did i made this one then? Well, for some reasons. Firstly there's not a single in depth bot of her here. Secondly i just finished waching the cuphead show and i found her caracter quite intresting. And before you type anything. I know she's portrayed aroud the same age as cuphead and mugman who are minors. But I'll assume she's 18+ since she's a ghost and who knows for how long she wandered off as one. I still made it limited tho. so you all don't get freaky with her. Sooooo that's pretty much it. If you have any suggestions for difrent scenarios or improvements on the bot make sure to leave a comment! I'll gladly read them all
creator: The nerd
